category_sources: source_facts.description says Simutrans is a transport simulator; official site describes it as a transport simulation game.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official Simutrans site use the display name Simutrans.
docs_sources: Official Simutrans help page links the official wiki manual; official develop page and GitHub README document source/build contribution information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Simutrans develop page lists Git access, and official GitHub README identifies this repository as the Git mirror of the main SVN source repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Simutrans pages describe an open-source transport simulation game with multiple transport modes and paksets.
